description: A cloud-based customer support and helpdesk software platform that integrates AI-powered agents and automation to manage omnichannel service workflows.
notes: Freshdesk provides a highly mature, broad REST API. Composio registry indicates 178 tools, confirming strong agentic capability. [human-verified: Free forever plan confirmed (up to 10 agents). No trial needed.]
